name: Moth Girl TF ~ Get lanterned, you fool!
description:
Insect Girls, my beloved.

One day, while working at your dead end office job, you decided to sneak into the Lost & Found department - hoping to see anything that might make your boring day a little bit more interesting. As if your wish was granted, you find a oddly placed bug zapper resembling a lantern. You decide to turn it on, causing it's lights to flicker in and out for a second, before blasting your face with a blindingly bright light! Getting back on your feet after being startled by the UNREASONABLY BRIGHT blight, you feel a strange heat in your chest. Unbeknownst to you, that lantern's light has caused you to start turnign into an anthro moth girl!
How will you deal with this transformation? How will your co-workers react? Will you get disability pay because of your transformation or will they straight up fire you?! Find out by using this bot!

This is my first bot on this site, so I'm sorry if you encounter any problems.
If you have any suggestions for future bots, make sure to leave them in the comments!

Inspired by @Ezik's Mal0 TF bot and @Cloak69's Moth girl TF.
Art made by Warl_Granada
creator: ThatBreastExpansionGuy
